options.name: <ptnName>
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition.

options.name: -nested
options.description: Delete all nested partititons in the design.

options.name: -non_leaf
options.description: Delete all Non-leaf partitions in the design.

options.name: -undo_tcl_file
options.description: Specifies file which can be sourced to undo deletion of partitions
